subject: Re: Leah Kleman
body:

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

> I just wanted to remind you that a response to the
> complaint is due on  
> December 1, 2005 in the Rutledge case.  That is in
> two weeks.  I will  write the 
> first draft of the Brief for our motion to dismiss
> to save money, but  Kamensky 
> is ultimately going to need a few days notice to
> review and comment on  my 
> draft and prepare all of the necessary supporting
> docs (e.g., motion,  proposed 
> order, notice of motion, and review and etc.).  We
> should talk  about 
> settlement options and make a decision soon to give
> enough time to  Kamensky to prepare 
> the final motion papers, if necessary.  
>  
> Monday?
>  
> Darren

body_html:
send leahs lawyer the letter ,,,,carbon to her

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

I just wanted to remind you that a response to the
complaint is due on
December 1, 2005 in the Rutledge case. That is in
two weeks. I will write the
first draft of the Brief for our motion to dismiss
to save money, but Kamensky
is ultimately going to need a few days notice to
review and comment on my
draft and prepare all of the necessary supporting
docs (e.g., motion, proposed
order, notice of motion, and review and etc.). We
should talk about
settlement options and make a decision soon to give
enough time to Kamensky to prepare
the final motion papers, if necessary.

Monday?

Darren

http://mail.yahoo.com
